name: io.github.modelcontextprotocol/postgres
description: Connect to PostgreSQL databases and execute queries, manage schemas, and analyze data.

environmentVariables.name: POSTGRES_CONNECTION_STRING
environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL connection string in libpq format. Use a read-only role for safety.
